description: A user can register a new account with email and password (min 8 chars, complexity enforced)
verification_steps: POST /auth/register with valid email and password
Verify JWT token returned in response
Verify user record created in database

description: A user can log in with email and password and receive a JWT access token
verification_steps: Verify access token and refresh token returned
Verify account lockout after failed attempts

description: A user's session is maintained via 30-min access tokens with 7-day refresh token rotation (HttpOnly cookies)
verification_steps: Verify access token expires after 30 minutes
Verify refresh token silently renews the access token
Verify refresh token stored as HttpOnly cookie

description: A user must verify their email before accessing diagnostic tools
verification_steps: Register new user and verify email verification token sent
Verify unverified users are blocked from /audit/* endpoints

description: A user can change their password from the profile settings page
verification_steps: PUT /users/me/password with current and new password
Verify old password required for change
Verify bcrypt hash updated in database

description: A user's session is protected against CSRF attacks via stateless HMAC tokens with a separate CSRF_SECRET_KEY
verification_steps: Verify state-changing requests require valid CSRF token
Verify bearer-auth paths are exempt from CSRF

description: A user's account is locked after repeated failed login attempts
verification_steps: Verify account is locked after threshold

description: A user can upload files in 10 formats: XLSX, XLS, CSV, TSV, TXT, OFX, QBO, IIF, PDF, ODS
verification_steps: Upload a file in each of the 10 supported formats
Verify each format is parsed correctly into a DataFrame
Verify tier-gated format access for non-standard formats
notes: Tier-gated: Free gets CSV/XLSX/XLS; paid tiers get all 10

description: A user can inspect multi-sheet Excel workbooks before analysis to select sheets and preview columns
verification_steps: Verify sheet names, row counts, and column headers returned
Verify user can select specific sheets for analysis

description: A user can upload a trial balance and receive comprehensive diagnostics including classification, anomaly detection, ratios, and lead sheets (Tool 1)
verification_steps: POST /audit/trial-balance with a CSV trial balance
Verify account classification, anomaly detection, and ratio calculations
Verify lead sheet groupings (A-Z) are generated
Verify zero-storage: data not persisted after response

description: A user can compare current, prior, and budget period trial balances with movement classification (Tool 2)
verification_steps: Verify movement categories: NEW, CLOSED, SIGN_CHANGE, INCREASE, DECREASE, UNCHANGED

description: A user can run a 19-test JE testing battery across structural, statistical, and advanced tiers (Tool 3)
verification_steps: Verify 19 test results returned with flagged entries
Verify composite risk score and tier classification

description: A user can run a 13-test AP payment testing battery for duplicate detection, fraud indicators, and vendor analysis (Tool 4)
verification_steps: Verify 13 test results with flagged payments

description: A user can upload bank statement and GL cash detail for automated transaction matching and reconciliation (Tool 5)
verification_steps: Verify matched, bank-only, and ledger-only transactions identified

description: A user can run an 11-test payroll testing battery for employee and compensation analysis (Tool 6)
A user can validate purchase orders, receiving reports, and invoices with three-way match testing (Tool 7)
verification_steps: POST /audit/three-way-match with PO, receipt, and invoice data
Verify match results and discrepancies identified

description: A user can run a 16-test revenue testing battery with ASC 606/IFRS 15 contract analysis (Tool 8)
A user can run an 11-test AR aging analysis for receivables risk assessment (Tool 9)
verification_steps: Verify 11 test results and aging buckets

description: A user can run a 9-test fixed asset testing battery with lease indicator (FA-10) (Tool 10)
A user can run a 9-test inventory testing battery for valuation and obsolescence analysis (Tool 11)
A user can design and evaluate statistical samples per ISA 530 with CSPRNG-based selection (Tool 12)
verification_steps: Verify sample design parameters and evaluation results

description: A user can convert trial balance amounts between currencies for multi-currency engagements
verification_steps: Upload trial balance with currency conversion parameters
Verify amounts converted at specified exchange rates

description: A user's trial balance accounts are automatically classified into Assets, Liabilities, Equity, Revenue, Expenses using 80+ keyword rules
verification_steps: Upload trial balance and verify classification results
Verify weighted heuristic scoring across categories

description: A user receives automated detection of sign errors, unusual balances, suspense accounts, concentration risk, and rounding anomalies
verification_steps: Upload trial balance with known anomalies
Verify anomalies detected with type, severity, and confidence

description: A user's trial balance accounts are grouped into A-Z lead sheet categories for workpaper organization
verification_steps: Upload trial balance and verify lead sheet groupings
Verify all accounts mapped to appropriate categories

description: A user can create, approve, and apply multi-line adjusting journal entries with approval gating
verification_steps: Verify approval workflow and status transitions
POST /audit/adjustments/apply to apply entries to TB
notes: Approval-gated: entries require approval before application

description: A user receives 17 core financial ratios + 8 industry-specific ratios with DuPont decomposition and trend analysis
verification_steps: Upload trial balance and verify 17 core ratios calculated
Verify industry-specific ratios for selected industry

description: A user can compare their ratios against 6 industry benchmarks (manufacturing, retail, technology, healthcare, professional services, construction)
A user can generate a Balance Sheet from lead sheet groupings with prior year columns and footnotes
verification_steps: Verify Balance Sheet structure (assets, liabilities, equity)
Verify prior year columns if available

description: A user can generate an Income Statement from lead sheet groupings
verification_steps: Verify Income Statement structure (revenue, expenses, net income)

description: A user can generate a Cash Flow Statement using the indirect method per ASC 230/IAS 7
verification_steps: Verify indirect method cash flow generation

description: A user can export a TB Diagnostic PDF report with Oat & Obsidian branding
verification_steps: Verify PDF generated with correct sections

description: A user can export Financial Statements as PDF or Excel
verification_steps: Verify both formats contain BS + IS

description: A user can export a JE Testing Memo PDF (PCAOB AS 1215)
verification_steps: Verify PDF contains all test results and standards references

description: A user can export an AP Testing Memo PDF (ISA 240 / PCAOB AS 2401)
verification_steps: Verify PDF generated with standards references

description: A user can export a Payroll Testing Memo PDF
verification_steps: Verify PDF generated with all test sections

description: A user can export a Three-Way Match Memo PDF
A user can export a Revenue Testing Memo PDF
verification_steps: Verify PDF generated with ASC 606/IFRS 15 references

description: A user can export an AR Aging Memo PDF
A user can export a Fixed Asset Testing Memo PDF
verification_steps: POST /export/fixed-asset-memo with fixed asset test results
Verify PDF generated with FA-10 lease indicator

description: A user can export an Inventory Testing Memo PDF
A user can export a Bank Reconciliation Memo PDF
A user can export a Multi-Period Comparison Memo PDF
A user can export a Currency Conversion Memo PDF
A user can export a Sampling Design Memo PDF (ISA 530)
verification_steps: Verify PDF generated with ISA 530 references

description: A user can export a Sampling Evaluation Memo PDF
A user can export a Data Quality Pre-Flight Memo PDF
A user can export a Population Profile Memo PDF
A user can export an Expense Category Memo PDF
A user can export an Accrual Completeness Memo PDF
A user can export a Flux Expectations Memo PDF
A user can export TB diagnostics as a 4-tab Excel workpaper
A user can export trial balance, anomalies, JE flagged entries, AP flagged payments, bank rec, and movements as CSV
A user can export A-Z lead sheet workbook as Excel
verification_steps: Verify Excel workbook with A-Z tab structure

description: A user can subscribe to paid tiers via Stripe checkout with monthly or annual billing
verification_steps: Verify webhook handling for subscription events
Verify subscription status reflected in user tier
notes: Code complete but waiting on production Stripe keys (Sprint 447 — CEO action required)

description: A user sees Free/Solo($100)/Professional($500)/Enterprise($1000) pricing tiers — all paid tiers get all 12 tools
verification_steps: Verify pricing page shows correct tier names and prices
Verify all paid tiers have access to all 12 tools

description: A user can manage their subscription (upgrade, cancel, view invoices) via Stripe Customer Portal
verification_steps: Verify Manage Billing button opens Stripe portal
notes: Blocked on Sprint 447 — Stripe production cutover

description: A user on Professional/Enterprise tier can add seats for team members with per-seat pricing
verification_steps: Verify seat count reflected in Stripe subscription
notes: Blocked on Sprint 447 — Stripe production cutover

description: A user is gated to their tier's entitlements — Free tier has limited access, paid tiers get all tools
verification_steps: Verify Free tier blocked from premium endpoints
Verify paid tier has access to all 12 tools

description: A user can create, view, update, and delete client records with industry classification
verification_steps: Verify multi-tenant isolation (users only see their clients)

description: A user can view paginated activity history of their diagnostic analyses (metadata only, GDPR-compliant)
verification_steps: Verify only aggregate metadata stored (no financial data)
DELETE /activity/clear for GDPR right to erasure

description: A user can configure practice-wide settings including materiality formulas and testing thresholds
verification_steps: Verify materiality formula options (fixed, % of revenue/assets/equity)
Verify JE and AP threshold configuration

description: A user can configure personal preferences and profile information
A user experiences the Oat & Obsidian premium fintech design system across all pages
verification_steps: Verify obsidian/oatmeal/clay/sage token usage across components
Verify Merriweather headers, Lato body, JetBrains Mono financial data
Verify no generic Tailwind colors (slate-*, blue-*, etc.)

description: A user can access a universal command palette (Cmd+K) for quick navigation across the application
verification_steps: Verify Cmd+K / Ctrl+K opens command palette
Verify palette accessible from all authenticated pages

description: A user works within the Workspace Shell ('Audit OS') that provides workspace-centric navigation across all 12 tools
verification_steps: Verify all 12 tools accessible from workspace context

description: A user can manage engagements with materiality cascade, follow-up tracker, workpaper index, and completion gate
verification_steps: Verify materiality cascade from engagement to tool level
Verify follow-up items tracked without audit terminology
notes: Engagement guardrails: no audit terminology, no financial data storage

description: The backend exposes /health/live (liveness) and /health/ready (readiness) probes for orchestrator health checks
verification_steps: GET /health/ready returns 200 with DB pool stats
Verify Docker HEALTHCHECK uses these endpoints

description: The API enforces 5-tier rate limiting (AUTH/AUDIT/EXPORT/WRITE/DEFAULT) with per-user and per-IP throttling
verification_steps: Verify rate limit headers in API responses

description: The backend produces structured JSON logs suitable for log aggregation with configurable log level
verification_steps: Verify no PII in logs (Zero-Storage compliance)

description: The application sends errors and performance traces to Sentry for monitoring (both backend and frontend)
verification_steps: Verify error capture in both backend and frontend
notes: Zero-Storage: no PII, no request bodies, no replays

description: The backend exposes Prometheus metrics for file format processing and system monitoring
GitHub Actions CI pipeline runs backend tests, frontend build, frontend tests, mypy, secrets scanning, and E2E smoke tests
verification_steps: Verify PR checks pass before merge
Verify E2E smoke tests run on main-only
notes: 14 CI checks per Secure SDL v1.1

description: The application can be deployed via docker-compose with backend, frontend, and optional PostgreSQL services
The backend automatically cleans up expired tokens, sessions, and old metadata records based on configurable retention windows
verification_steps: Verify refresh token cleanup runs on schedule

description: AGENTS.md provides the primary agent entry point with startup sequence, documentation map, and key constraints
verification_steps: Verify AGENTS.md exists at repo root
Verify documentation map links are valid
Verify startup sequence references correct files

description: SESSION_STATE.md provides lightweight cold-start session memory for agent orientation
verification_steps: Verify SESSION_STATE.md exists at repo root
Verify it contains last session, environment state, next priority, and git context

description: features/status.json provides machine-readable ground truth for all built and unbuilt features
verification_steps: Verify features/status.json exists and is valid JSON
Verify all 20 memo reports have entries

description: scripts/init.sh bootstraps the full local development environment with dependency installation, service startup, and smoke checks
verification_steps: Verify --check-only flag validates without starting services
Verify prerequisite checks for Python, Node, npm, .env files
